response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio dialogue does not contain vocal music, matching the reference JSON's note. The spoken Japanese banter and interactions were manually transcribed.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was utilized for high-level scene structure and segment descriptions, while all conversational dialogue was manually transcribed and translated.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize with the exact milliseconds of character vocalizations. Subtitle blocks were kept brief and logically paced, with transitions handled smoothly to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: つよつよカッコいい用心棒、侍の、風真いろはでござる！
subtitles.english: The strong and cool bodyguard, samurai, Kazama Iroha is here!

subtitles.original: うーん... はぁ...
subtitles.english: Wow... *sigh*

subtitles.original: ついにこの日が来てしまった。
subtitles.english: Finally, this day has come.

subtitles.original: 始まっちゃった。み、ミスらなかった。
subtitles.english: It has begun. I-I didn't mess up.

subtitles.original: よかった。あぶないあぶない。
subtitles.english: Thank goodness. That was close, that was close.

subtitles.original: あ、最初のメドレー、凄かったでしょ！
subtitles.english: Ah, the first medley was amazing, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: みんなこんな風に混ざってソロ来るって予想できてたー？
subtitles.english: Did everyone expect that we'd mix together like this for the solos?

subtitles.original: イェーイ！/ピンクの人.../ごつっ！
subtitles.english: Yay!/The pink person.../Thud!

subtitles.original: だよね、だよね。予想外よね。
subtitles.english: Right, right. It was unexpected.

subtitles.original: もう、最初からクライマックス。
subtitles.english: It's already a climax from the very beginning.

subtitles.original: それぐらいの盛り上がりではある。始まったばっかだけどね。
subtitles.english: The excitement is already at that level. Though it's just started.

subtitles.original: 始まったばっかといえばさ、みんなあの自己紹介の時に、実はみんなもうちょっとウルッときてて。
subtitles.english: Speaking of just starting, during the self-introductions, everyone was actually already getting a bit teary-eyed.

subtitles.original: やめてよ、その話は！
subtitles.english: Stop it, don't talk about that!

subtitles.original: いや、なんならもう、楽屋の時点で、ルイさんは、一番早かったのはルイさん！
subtitles.english: Actually, even back in the dressing room, Lui-san... The earliest one to cry was Lui-san!

subtitles.original: いやいやいや！違うの違うの！違うの！
subtitles.english: No, no, no! That's not it, that's not it! That's not it!

subtitles.original: 花粉症！
subtitles.english: Hay fever!

subtitles.original: ごまかすなよ！/ごまかしてない！
subtitles.english: Don't try to cover it up!/I'm not covering it up!

subtitles.original: 花粉症！
subtitles.english: It's hay fever!

subtitles.original: いいじゃん、素直になれば。メンバー大好きで泣きだし.../泣きだしてない！
subtitles.english: Come on, just be honest. You started crying because you love the members.../I didn't start crying!

subtitles.original: やめてよ！
subtitles.english: Stop it!

subtitles.original: それをみんなでいじってたのに、
subtitles.english: We were teasing her about it, but...

subtitles.original: ここに来てみんなの笑顔を見たらさ.../いや、そう。
subtitles.english: But when we came out here and saw everyone's smiles.../Well, yes.

subtitles.original: なんか、始まる前はさ、みんなこんなんで待ってたのに。
subtitles.english: Like, before it started, everyone was waiting like this.

subtitles.original: 自己紹介が始まった瞬間、うぅーってなって、
subtitles.english: But the moment the self-introductions started, we were like, 'Ugh...'

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ笑顔でうぅーってなって、
subtitles.english: trying to smile so hard while tearing up.

subtitles.original: みんなの声とか音とかが凄くて、みんな泣いてた。
subtitles.english: Everyone's voices and the sound were so amazing, everyone was crying.

subtitles.original: そう、ウルッときて、でも「やらなきゃ！」ってやったんだよね。
subtitles.english: Right, we got teary-eyed, but we thought, 'We have to do this!' and we did it.

subtitles.original: やら、やらないといけないよね。
subtitles.english: We, we have to do it.

subtitles.original: もう、今日はかまさないといけないよ。
subtitles.english: We really have to blow everyone away today.

subtitles.original: でも、1曲目はかませたんじゃないか？
subtitles.english: But didn't we blow them away with the first song?

subtitles.original: かませてたー？
subtitles.english: Did we blow you away?

subtitles.original: ちょっとさ、最初の曲のメドレーのさ、タイトル言ってやってよ。
subtitles.english: Hey, tell them the title of that first medley.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、これ読むの？めっちゃかっこよく言えるよ。
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, I have to read this? I can say it really coolly.

subtitles.original: みんな、まぁ「GyoukouX」は知ってるよね？
subtitles.english: Everyone, you all know 'GyoukouX', right?

subtitles.original: 今日のための特別タイトルあるから。
subtitles.english: Because there's a special title just for today.

subtitles.original: そうなのよ、叫ぶから。
subtitles.english: Yes, because she's going to shout it.

subtitles.original: いくぞ！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: 「GyoukouX...」
subtitles.english: 'GyoukouX...'

subtitles.original: 「GyoukouX-tended Remix みんなの殺意を詰め込んでみましたバージョン」！
subtitles.english: 'GyoukouX-tended Remix: We Tried Packing in Everyone's Murderous Intent Version'!

subtitles.original: なんか最後、ちょっと...
subtitles.english: The end was a bit...

subtitles.original: そのままじゃない？無理やりじゃない？
subtitles.english: Isn't that just literal? Isn't that a bit forced?

subtitles.original: かっけえ。
subtitles.english: So cool.

subtitles.original: 決まったぜ。
subtitles.english: I nailed it.

subtitles.original: 配信組も盛り上がってますかー？
subtitles.english: Are the stream viewers pumped up too?

subtitles.original: 配信組も頑張るでござるよ！
subtitles.english: Let's do our best, stream viewers!

subtitles.original: コメントも見えてるからね。
subtitles.english: We can see your comments too.

subtitles.original: コメントも「イェーイ」「うおー」しか言ってない。
subtitles.english: The comments are just saying 'Yay' and 'Whoa'.

subtitles.original: 「タイトル長い」って言われてる。
subtitles.english: They're saying, 'The title is too long'.

subtitles.original: 長くないよ！吾輩の名前より短いじゃん。
subtitles.english: It's not long! It's shorter than my name, isn't it?

subtitles.original: それはそう。
subtitles.english: That's true.

subtitles.original: そういえば、みんな開演前から気づいたと思うけど、
subtitles.english: By the way, I think everyone noticed before the show started, but...

subtitles.original: DJ！
subtitles.english: The DJ!

subtitles.original: 最高だよ！落ちないようにね！
subtitles.english: It's the best! Make sure you don't fall off!

subtitles.original: 本当だよ。ちょっと怖いよ絶対。超たけえし。
subtitles.english: Really. It must be a bit scary up there. It's super high.

subtitles.original: というわけで、ここから先は、本当の任務に入っていくぞ！
subtitles.english: And so, from here on, we're heading into the real mission!

subtitles.original: なんですけど、ここで...
subtitles.english: But, at this point...

subtitles.original: いやだ！吾輩は聞かない！
subtitles.english: No! I won't listen!

subtitles.original: まさか、まさか...
subtitles.english: Don't tell me, don't tell me...

subtitles.original: ちょっと私から言うのもあれなんで、コヨちゃんお願いします。/おいおいおい！人の口を借りるな！
subtitles.english: It's a bit awkward for me to say it, so Koyo-chan, please./Hey, hey, hey! Don't make me say it!

subtitles.original: はい、ではちょっと大事なお知らせです。
subtitles.english: Alright, we have an important announcement.

subtitles.original: YouTube、TikTokライブでご覧になっている方、無料チラ見せパートはここまでとなります！
subtitles.english: For those watching on YouTube or TikTok Live, the free preview part ends here!

subtitles.original: うわー！/関係ないのに「えー」って言ってくれてる。
subtitles.english: Whoa!/Even though it doesn't affect them, they're saying 'Eee' for us.

subtitles.original: ですが！この後も、あんなパフォーマンスや、ゴージャスな楽曲など、
subtitles.english: But! Even after this, there will be performances like that and gorgeous songs,

subtitles.original: 今からでも間に合いますので、この辺、概要欄から、この辺、配信チケットを購入してください！
subtitles.english: You can still make it, so please purchase a streaming ticket from around here, the description box, or around here!

subtitles.original: ここ、ここ！/ここ、ここです！
subtitles.english: Here, here!/Here, right here!

subtitles.original: 欲張りセット。音がした。これでいこう。
subtitles.english: The greedy set. Sounds. Let's do this.

subtitles.original: お前ら、絶対買えよな！買った音した、買った音。
subtitles.english: You guys, make sure you buy it! I heard the sound of buying, the sound of buying.
